mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales indicates improving household demand and near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the RSAFS trend is rising.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2025-02-01 was 722708.0 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if rising 3-month RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional 65.5% baseline in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 4.0%, restrictive policy raises equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2025-03-01 was 4.33 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS-above-4.0 observations deliver positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward instances.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate combined with decelerating payroll growth signals labor-market deterioration that reduces expected earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3pp over 3 months and PAYEMS 3-month growth falls below its prior 12-month median
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2025-03-01 was 4.2 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction trigger has a nonnegative average 60-day excess return versus unconditional returns over three consecutive walk-forward years.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2025-02-01 was 104.2062 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if positive 6-month INDPRO momentum has Rank IC below 0.03 with 60-day S&P 500 returns in every rolling 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in housing starts below trend signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% below its trailing 12-month average
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2025-02-01 was 1501.0 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST weakness is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of cases or has no negative return differential versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI while the federal funds rate remains high signals persistent inflation pressure and limited policy easing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds its 6-month annualized growth and FEDFUNDS > 4.0%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2025-03-01 was 319.615 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI acceleration and high FEDFUNDS interaction produces positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in at least 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A falling unemployment rate combined with positive payroll momentum signals resilient income growth and lower recession risk, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses below its trailing 6-month average while PAYEMS 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2025-03-01 was 159398 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-strength trigger fails to beat the unconditional 20-day positive-return rate by at least 5 percentage points in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the federal funds rate signals near-term policy easing and lower discount-rate pressure, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls by at least 0.10pp from the prior month
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS monthly declines are followed by negative 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of triggered walk-forward observations.
